name: Mood Journal
description: An app to track and manage emotions, helping users identify patterns and gain insights into their mental well-being. It allows users to log their emotions and thoughts, creating a personalized journal.
features: Emotion tracking with customizable mood boards
Journal entry logging with text, images, and audio
Personalized recommendations for stress relief and self-care
Secure data storage with optional cloud syncing
target_audience: Individuals seeking to improve their mental health and well-being
